arts.ttl: Graham Potter: Chelsea sack was 'the best thing that happened to me'
arts.sum: West Ham head coach Graham Potter has opened up on his dire spell at Chelsea and does not regret this 'learning experience' at all. Potter had been out of a job for almost two years after his sacking by Chelsea in April 2022 following a brief but intense spell at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca is now 'seriously considering' dropping one Chelsea star for West Ham clash - journalist
arts.sum: He's got a decision to make.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano makes Chelsea transfer prediction and says 'It's going to be crazy'
arts.sum: The final few hours of Chelsea's January transfer window are expected to be ‘crazy’, according to transfer expert Fabrizio Romano. Click this link to follow the football.london Chelsea WhatsApp channel, where you'll be kept up to date on the latest Blues news wherever you are.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'close' to sanctioning another transfer ahead of deadline day
arts.sum: Santos have until February 28 until the transfer window in Brazil closes, which allows plenty of time to strike a deal to sign Washington on loan from Chelsea. However, the move was never completed and Washington would go on to remain at Stamford Bridge, but appears close to leaving the club 18 months after his arrival.

arts.ttl: West Ham leading race to sign 18-year-old attacker, in talks to get the deal done
arts.sum: West Ham United are hoping to sign the Celtic striker Daniel Cummings. According to Anthony Joseph from Sky Sports, Portsmouth are keen on signing the player as well and Cummings had been in talks with them. However, West Ham are now leading the race to secure his signature. The 18-year-old will be a free agent […] The post West Ham leading race to sign 18-year-old attacker, in talks to get the deal done appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea chiefs clearly disagree with Gianfranco Zola about Cesare Casadei as midfielder exits club - opinion
arts.sum: Chelsea have completed their first permanent sale of the summer transfer window over the weekend as time runs out in the January transfer window. Cesare...

arts.ttl: Maresca targets €200m raid as Chelsea submit first bid
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly eyeing yet another Brighton & Hove Albion raid as Enzo Maresca looks to bolster his first-team squad in 2025. Brighton will reportedly demand a fee in excess of €120m for Baleba, while the Seagulls are unlikely to accept a bid worth anything less than €50m for Rutter.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel 'chooses next club' with Man United, Arsenal, Chelsea 'all battling' for Bayern Munich man
arts.sum: Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel reportedly signals that he wants to join Manchester United in the latter stages of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea sent Alejandro Garnacho transfer hint ahead of deadline day
arts.sum: Since then, Chelsea have cooled their interest slightly in Garnacho but football.london understands that the Blues' recruitment department have not ruled out a late offer to the United winger. Manchester United continued their commitment to utilise winger Alejandro Garnacho ahead of deadline day despite interest from Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea now close to signing £30m striker compared to Karim Benzema
